name: leaderboard
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.topEarners.every(r => typeof r.earnedCc === 'number' && r.earnedCc > 0)
_note: bounties.leaderboard ranks top earners + top resolvers from the in-memory earnings/resolved counters. Runs ok:true with empty arrays on a fresh store (never no_db). limit is clamped 1..50. Every listed earner has earnedCc > 0; the page never exceeds the clamped limit. earnedCc is the leaderboard counter, not a real wallet balance.
